project_type: Android app (Java/Kotlin) - Sketchware Pro IDE with code project mode
build_system: Gradle with version catalog (libs.versions.toml). Android compileSdk 36, minSdk 26, Java 17. Uses fileTree JARs in app/libs/.
test_framework: No unit tests found for the codeproject module. The project uses Android instrumented testing patterns but none exist yet for this feature area.
test_command: N/A - no tests for codeproject module
verification_instructions: Run ./gradlew assembleDebug to ensure code compiles without errors. Check that all new/modified files have correct imports and follow existing code patterns.
setup_instructions: Java 17 required, Gradle 8.14 available via wrapper. Use mise to set java 17 before building.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Android SDK not pre-installed but Gradle wrapper handles dependencies. Java 17 available via mise.
contribution_requirements: Use Java (not Kotlin) for new source files in the codeproject package. Follow existing naming conventions (code_project_ prefix for string resources). Commit to feat/code-project-mode branch.
key_patterns: sora-editor 0.23.5 used for code editor (Content class at io.github.rosemoe.sora.text.Content). FileProvider already configured at ${applicationId}.provider with external-path '.' in provider_paths.xml. Builder pattern: CodeProjectBuilder with BuildProgressListener interface. Code project files reside in pro.sketchware.codeproject package with sub-packages: build, editor, model, template, ui.
directory_structure: app/src/main/java/pro/sketchware/codeproject/ - main package for code project mode. Sub-packages: build/ (CodeProjectBuilder), editor/ (JavaAutoCompleteLanguage), model/ (CodeProject data class), template/ (CodeProjectTemplate scaffold generator), ui/ (Activity, adapters, tabs). Resources: res/layout/activity_code_project.xml, res/menu/menu_code_project.xml. Build output goes to project's bin/ directory.
